## Written Summary
 Witten Summary: Motherboard is an extremely important component that is found in electronic devices, metaphorically it is the nervous system of the computer because without the motherboard the computer wouldn’t operate.
The processor executes instructions, performs calculations and coordinates input/output operations, to install the processor the arrow at the corner must match with the arrow on the motherboard after matching the arrows you place it and close it down.
RAM is a component that provides storage that lasts only for a limited period, and it is a memory that stores data of a working electronic device, installing the RAM stick make sure you line up the little notch in it with the notch that’s on the motherboard. Power supply absorbs the AC from the wall outlet and transmutes it to DC and minimise the voltage using an input power transformer, to install the power supply start by assembling it to the power supply slot after that insert the 24 pin cable to 24 pin slot on the motherboard.
Storage device component stores information and data so that they can be processed, it has two connectors SATA power slot and SATA data slot, insert the SATA data cable to the SATA data slot on the SSD storage device and insert SATA power cable to the SATA power slot on the SSD storage device.
